context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct `npx skills add` command syntax including the -g (global install) and -y (skip confirmation) flags when installing a skill, and whether it correctly identifies the domain and task before searching.

checklist.name: Uses npx skills add
checklist.description: The install script or command file uses `npx skills add` (not `npm install`, `yarn add`, or any other package manager command) to install the skill

checklist.name: -g flag present
checklist.description: The install command includes the `-g` flag for global (user-level) installation

checklist.name: -y flag present
checklist.description: The install command includes the `-y` flag to skip confirmation prompts

checklist.name: Correct package syntax
checklist.description: The install command uses the `owner/repo@skill` format (e.g., `vercel-labs/agent-skills@deployment`) rather than a bare package name

checklist.name: Leaderboard consulted
checklist.description: The documentation shows the agent checked skills.sh leaderboard as part of the discovery process

checklist.name: Quality signals checked
checklist.description: The documentation mentions at least one of: install count, source reputation, or GitHub stars for the chosen skill

checklist.name: Domain identified
checklist.description: The documentation or comments identify the domain and specific task before searching (e.g., 'DevOps / deployment automation')
